reviews.review_description:
Hi everybody, I’m very new to this game, (only three days old), but I have to admit. This is really fun 🤩!!! I’ve met some great & helpful people, made new friends & I am really enjoying myself. Now I won’t lie to you, this game can be challenging, but let’s be honest, that’s what makes it fun. I hope to see you there,,, {as long as you’re Not on the other side 😈} 
Have Fun

I love how you can try so many different characters. It accommodates everyone's play style and preferred comfort level.
I'm happy to support this game and see where it goes! 😃

Feedback: It would be great to be able to receive game invites while in a match. (And turn notifications on or off).

reviews.review_title: Hands down, the best VR game out there
reviews.review_description:
I want to preface this by saying, I am a game developer myself, a VR one at that, and I am absolutely blown away by what you managed to accomplish! 
The moment I launched the game, I was first amazed by the fantastic graphics for standalone, and the buttery smooth performance. Shortly after that, I was brought to one of the best, most informative, and easy-to-follow tutorials I've ever tried.
It's highly engaging, and it is astonishing to see how many different mechanics there are for each hero. I spent two days on and off, following each hero's tutorial and trying out different things with them.
The craziest part is that the game is FREE TO PLAY! This is what I am most shocked by. This is one of the very few games where I find myself actively seeking out more ways of supporting the devs (e.g., buying the Elite Battlepass or store credits).
If I could give it 6 / 5 stars, I would. Genuinely love this game, and I can see myself getting lost in it for hours on end.

I used to play LoL all the time so this game has scratched an itch I didn't even know that I had. I'm still new and learning but it's easy to jump in and play even if you don't know what is going on.

Edit: If your login attempt times out, try connecting through a hotspot (tether with your phone). This is an ISP issue and has nothing to do with the game developers. I have a similar issue with a PS5 game.

Ok, me and my friend were looking for a good, free, and fun shooter game when we came across this. We tried it and the only bad thing is when you get a new character you have to play a long tutorial with it and sometimes glitches and never ends. Other than that it’s a solid game! Nice job devs!👍

Hello, Im LeppVR and this is probably the best game I’ve ever played! I’ve played this game many of you might know called SMITE and that is what attracted me to play this game and love it. If you don’t know what SMITE is it’s a moba game with a ton of goddesses whether it’s a Greek goddess or any other goddess it’s probably in that game!

reviews.review_title: Impressed, one of my most played titles
reviews.review_description:
Didn't click the first time I tried, came back glad I did, very fun VR MOBA, great unique characters with very different play styles, love playing support myself, very smooth, no junk, no noticeable lag even though im playing with many Americans.

Some of the best fun I've had multiplayer on VR,  if you play peak times and get full games of humans, very different, tactics and game play styles changes,  very fun. Well done to the developers.

Thos is a very well made game very fun to play but i do have a suggestion we kinda only have one flying character sooo

I want a angel paladin not a support! That can fly maybe not as high or fast as the spaceship but still a character that can provide air damage

Theia games should be looked at as primer examples of what a development studio should be. They understand and value what makes their game special, and instead of ignoring it, they embrace it. Competitive games aren’t fun because of the gameplay, they are fun because of the community. Hundreds of players fighting relentlessly for a chance to win gold. Community is what builds a game, and while still small, this game has a supporting cast of active and unique developers, and players, who actively will play and provide insight relative to the games values. Starvault isn’t just a game that pushes vr to its limits, it’s actively pushing it far further than any game before it.

ever feel like,erm..i wonder what these LoL or DoTA or AoV or Vainglory champions or heroes would look like in VR?
well in starvault it is just that! a throve of stars or heroes that give you ahh tis is what pantheon be seeing. ashe be having strong arms to continuosly farm creeps. so this is what rumble be feeling just walking his  mech. While basic moba skills make you realised how cardio challenged you are by making you loose sleep by thinking ,aahhh that is how hard it is to kite. meanwhile to jungle (my natural born role as i do live in the jungle) without map awareness will auto derail you from the lanes and gets you lost in the wilderness. Tower diving gives you the intense feeling of really holding your breath while under tower fire. Creeps are creepy. Good luck ganking or roaming the rivers as a tank. All your  thoughts, like how would a melee hero can ever damage a flying drone without jumping through your roof to reach it?
Are answerable in starvault! 
glhf if you are like me.they do let you test all champions. spend a good few hours before even touching the in arena mechanics, shop items, builts and laning. High Skill ceiling and stamina to play this competatively. It's like freddy wong's VGHS but instead of shooter battleroyale, it's moba.

reviews.review_title: Fun game but needs offline mode
reviews.review_description: Since Larcenauts servers is getting cut off and you wasted all your money on a dead online only game all these games should have a offline bot mode to ensure playability once these servers are cut off. Until then don’t give any these games any money.

Good game, amazing graphics, plenty of people on there but the players that are always on and there discord is toxic as hell a group of regular players are so toxic it makes you not want to play the game, there discord is not much different with regular players who are rude and toxic and take the game so seriously it's as if it's there life

reviews.review_title: Refreshing and very fun take on MOBAs
reviews.review_description: This is a very fresh take on MOBAs imo and gets rid of all the things about MOBAs that I typically hate, which is the sweaty obession with countering enemies equipments and crap. It's just a really good hero shooter with unique MOBA mechanics, such as a big Titan that can shoot firewalls, lol.

I've played now this games for at least a few hundred hours, give or take.
It has most of anything you might ask and want in a VR game.
It keeps core mechanics of MOBA, has the added complexities of FPS(first person shooter) as well as First Person mele mechanics!
You're a mele? They got you covered.
You're a marksman? They got you covered.
You like to be sneaky? They got you covered.
You wanna be miss/mister save lives? Guess what, they got you covered.

What's more, the game is improving steadily. I've played for a while, and it has only gotten better.
The community is also very much supportive, of others, and of the devs.
We even started a fans wiki for this game!
Come and meet us, there's lots of fun, lots to do, experiment and even learn (:

Honestly, im skeptical about free vr games, but this one is actually great! There is in app purchases, but you can work around them other ways. Its just for cosmetics, everything can be worked at in game without paying any real money!. (Except battle pass)

Amazing game, challenging and sometimes frustrating but fun, very fun... there is some learning curve but the community is very supportive.
It's a milestone for quest 3. And kudos to the developers

I had the quest 2 and now quest 3. Out of all the games since the beginning i like this one the most. It combines a well known genre with amazing ideas and the possibility to be competetiv in a way not other game was - for me. It is still early, the game is not quite balanced. But the idea and the way it is done is amazing. Free to play, not pay to win and the actions in game feel inpactfull and fluid. Kind of like LoL. 
The player base will skyrocket when it is released on steam. 

I love it and my go to game from now on - keep it up, promote the game and everybody that didnt yet... join asap! 

Good job and thank you!
I just started today and I love the game already tbe graphics are fantastic and the community is too love it keep up thr good work with the game

reviews.review_title: Cons much bigger than pros unfortunately
reviews.review_description:
The course this game is taking is tragic. 
Started as a very good moba, now game is completely broken.

Devs unfortunately don’t know how to balance characters, they make some of them absurdly powerful the other completely useless.

reviews.review_title: Couldn’t have asked for a better moba
reviews.review_description: So far my experience has been 5 gold stars between an incredibly welcome community on discord I have made friends and had such a laugh in game it feels like a moba mixed with paladins shooter it’s fun it’s easy to learn. Every character feels unique in both movement and gameplay. As someone who’s disabled (legs) some characters I can’t play but that doesn’t restrict me entirely it’s fun and free what more could you want

As soon as I stepped into the game I felt like I was in a game that was never made before. I usually use side quest to increase the quality of games, but not this one. This game has graphics that are amazing that you don't need much to have a good time with it. My only downside unless I don't have enough time into it is the maps like idk if there are more or wtv but I wish there were more idk how long its been out, but overall amazing game I recommend it to all of people.
Amazing game. I absolutely love the graphics and the gameplay. Top tier. Still a few bugs and balances, but all around great.

Possibly the best free game I have come across on the meta store, fps MOBA, fun, good graphics easy but challenging gameplay, with a roster of characters that are balanced, fully advise anyone with a VR headset to get this game, hats of to the developers.
I never thought I would like a hero shooter so much, I just needed to play one on vr!

STARVAULT is one of the coolest VR games I’ve played in a while. It feels like Overwatch and a MOBA combined in VR, and somehow it works. The movement, abilities, and team fights are super fun. Definitely worth trying if you like competitive VR games.
This game is really fun
Been playing heaps. Really like it, definitely one of the best multiplayer games and it's my favorite MOBA!

I stumbled upon this game looking for something new to play and it has absolutely wowed me!

I find most VR games are entertaining at worst and kind of lazy at best (grab a gun and shoot like every other vr game out there), but this one is something special.

It has some of the most thoughtful design and control mechanics I've ever seen in a VR game and it takes the concept of a Moba and makes it very approachable and exciting for both people who have been following mobas for years, but also for people who have never played one.

It's fast paced, rewards strategic thinking and tactics, and you have to have and apply some genuine skill (you can shoot arrows every so often or you can really put a sweat into it and loose as many as you can nock) in order to excel and succeed.

I really really hope this game finds and keeps a healthy player base. This team will definitely happily get some of my money. <3

This game is excellent, offering a comprehensive and engaging experience. My only minor concerns pertain to the conduct of some younger players and the perceived lack of sufficient moderation. However, the mute function effectively addresses these issues, and I wholeheartedly award it five stars.
hard working devs continue to maintain game as well as adding new content.

reviews.review_title: Here we have an sweet ONE!
reviews.review_description: Here is one topnotch and fun game for everyone to go for... yeah i can say very easy  that other developers shot take notes here.... nr1 looks great. Nr 2 its smooth. Nr3 optimized well in balanced mode with difficulty happy to get more deeper in to game and see how it's like.. yeah lets say this nr 10 It's freaking FREE GAME  with some in-game current but if all are able to free all characters agter a wile of unlocked all i dont mind.... that makes this take a huge jump on this table of competition and workout sessions done well.  I am very excited about what future holds. Well done developers team dont *** this up you have truly something here!

i think it could use some work buuuut not to much again great game
😀🤏👏🙌
I liked it. There are certain things they should work on but I’ll leave it in the discord! Can’t put it down!!

reviews.review_title: LoL and DotA have nothing on this
reviews.review_description: This game is excellent.  It is a fully immersive experience.  It takes DotA further than what LoL and SMITE could.  It can only get better! The free-to-play model is fantastic.  There is a great deal of content.  I am excited to see what else they do.

I can play several matchs in a row without vr sickness that I could have in other games.
The gameplay is awesome by the way.
I expected to try more characters in the futur cause the dev have done a great job so far with the game style of each characters.

This game is great and I enjoy playing it! But when you complete the tutorial but it doesn’t say you did and you try to play a game you can’t even play with the avatars you buy I tried everything but I couldn’t fix it so I deleted it and reinstalled it I haven’t played it yet stay tuned!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we’re really sorry you ran into this issue — that’s definitely not the experience we want you to have.

It sounds like a bug with the tutorial completion and avatar usage, and we’d really like to investigate it further and help you get back into the game.

Could you please join our Discord and report this in the #bug-reports channel?
https://discord.gg/Pma3xBzC

If possible, include any details you remember (what happened, what you tried, etc.) — it will help us fix it faster.

Thanks again for your patience, and we hope to see you back in the game soon!

reviews.review_description: Monkey
Peak
Still new, but it's a good game, and has some pretty unique characters, too.
Once you understand concept, if new to MOBA, you will enjoy. Each character is unique and brings something different to teams as you play. Pretty fun to learn too. Get the game.

It's the only option of MOBA on VR, but even without competition, the devs didn't skimp. This is a fantastic game.

Each of the many characters is completely unique, with play styles ranging from a basic walk and shoot with a standard gun, to flying through the air like a jet fighter, controlling your movement by tilting your head. 

Each of the characters could be their own main character in any other VR game. I fall on an off with VR games, but this has me hooked. It's the only game that has genuinely brought out the same level of competitive spirit you get from PC/console games.

NOTE: in the starter lobbies, you'll probably be matched with a bunch of kids. Keep playing and you'll leave the beginner lobbies and get into games with real players ☺️

reviews.review_title: I like the game but a tad grindy
reviews.review_description: I love the characters but its hard to play them when they cost so much but the game is good
This game is awesome
Dynamic, well-thought-out, and evolving. Everything about this game is fantastic. I learned English and play with loads in my hands! A masterpiece!

there are 2 mechs you use your arms with, either Don't play them or just Work Out to play them longer, literally skill issue, stop complaining about the mechs, what are the devs gonna do? make you skinny? stop complaining about stuff for ONCE.

reviews.review_description: One of the best games on VR right now. Active groups to run with. Every much is exciting and fun to play. Come join us.
Great game, just try it
My favorite VR game

This game definitely works really well on VR. It's cleverly designed character base is fantastic. The incorporation of the headset itself as a movement mechanic on certain characters is absolute peak genius. I could live in this game if the world would let me.
I’m not gonna lie it’s beautiful

I was starting to give up on VR gaming…but this brought me right back!
What an AWESOME game! Well balanced and very controllable. You are never out of the action more than a few seconds and team play really matters.
That said, I hope they will never cross platform it with PC. That’s what destroyed Population One. So please leave those aimbot cheating PC players to their own platform while us VR players keep this for our own. Please 🙏🏻
Theres 12 character i think? With alot of variety my favorite being nemesis. Its a fps moba not much else to say
This game is very fun, absolutely addicting, honestly can't stop playing!

eague, I just played this for the first time today and I actually liked it.
a multitude of playstyles per character, the first coupla skins i bought wt only ingame currency was nice, AND it comes out on steam soon so I am definitly in on this game for a while
(makin a vid for my yt soon: Arkturus_425)

Listen. I've been a gamer over 30 years. (Barely over lol) Anyway. This is not only a great MOBA. I mean it when I say. This is a perfect example of what a VR game should be and feel like. I commend the team for not punking out and copying a flat screen game. Looking at you, ENTIRE VR INDUSTRY. 👀 Every character feels unique in their own way. While it's a MOBA. It doesn't feel like any MOBA you ever played. I don't even like MOBAS and I love this game. Get it. And it's free. You can farm in game currency and even get skins. You can also optionally purchase things to support the creators. 😉
Great game, very fun and well made.

When I tried playing this game, it’s a loading for the first time next time it will be faster, but when it wouldn’t load, I tried turning off my headset, but my headset wouldn’t turn off but I’m gonna update the review if the game works ￼

I'm a person experienced in other mobas from deadlock to league, gekishin, and smite. Outside being in vr obviously I like how this game has it's own identity with 2 lanes, jungle camps, bosses, and many things to fight over that are very different that what I am used to. Recalling is very unique and thrilling to try and capture the portal to do so. I've only play on 2 different days now but I have enjoyed the game a lot and hoping to learn more as I play and make friends.
Excellent game. Graphics are great. Plenty of characters to choose from the game. A littke tricky getting use to the game and strategies. Visual environment is classic

reviews.review_title: Amazing game, tutorial is too long
reviews.review_description: Amazing game overall, great idea. Only issue is the tutorial is horribly long. - midtoad
It is great game but I ran into a game breaking bug where none of the item you need to fight with just didn't work at all but it is really fun
I've never owned VR before but love mobas, i can say the Devs done an amazing job on this game. Hope more updates comes

This is a great game. The characters are balanced well, there are a lot of them, and the map is a good size. Rarely do I think "that's just unfair" or disagree with something that happened. My one nitpick is that the AIs can sometimes see you through trees and foliage, but they honestly need the power spike to keep up with the real players. Great game, if you're on the fence, give it a go.

When you play with a good team or even just with friends this game becomes the best place to just rampage, with the skills and different classes it makes the game smooth no matter what playstyle you like.

Edit 2: I gave it another shot today.. Controls seem to be backwards.. Activating my boost with Y instead of B for no reason.. Minimap says to open it with R thumbstick... That worked for a day.. Now it doesnt.. The new way to activate your active items was cool but was removed and replaced with the ability to hold down a button long enough to make the menu screen appear, even tho we have a dedicated menu button on the controller... New hero has a 5 sec stun ability... Just what we need.. More skills stuns.

Uninstalling and bumping down to 1 star.

Edit: It's been a few weeks testing the game.  Matchmaking has you teamed with noobs while the enemy is usually a tournament level competative team that's going to obliterate you. This needs to change. Asap. Inches from uninstalling.. 
There are a couple of GLARING "Derp" things about this game. For one... What moron developer thinks it's ok for the bots to be able to choose duplicate avatars?  Nothing fun about going up against 5 AI archers who always pull you into the fray to turn you into a pin cusion..  AND How long have MOBAs been out eh? You absolute morons actually allow a way to spawn camp the enemy team allowing for necessarily long matches of being trolled? Who is responsible for playtesting? Who let these 2 issues slip? This shows a blatant lack of quality. Game feels super rushed. Will stay at 2 stars until these 2 issues are fixed.. Next time, playtest. This was discovered in the first 5 hours. The first 3 games... And I didn't even design the thing..   

Pros: 
Plenty of characters.
Very Strategic
Very different characters
Classic MOBA gameplay

Cons:
1 A known exploit is users leaving purposely to rejoin game and have a higher level instantly
2 Some teams have duplicate heroes on their teams,  especially AI players
3 Stun , Slow, AND Silence powerups available to all and randomly proc..
4 Character has no "Hurt" sound.. can't tell when you're taking damage easily
5 AI bots fall into water easily when defending core
6 Easy to fall in water and die should never be in a game like this
7 90% of the time you join a game in progress VS having the option for a new game when choosing quick play 
8 Many games have been played and I didn't realize my core was being attacked
9 Choosing A shard multiplier and queueing for ranked matches can put you in quick play forcing you to risk losing it with noobs before your ranked match starts
10) Several classes cannot even damage drone At All.. (scorpion, assassin, at least)

Neutral: Need more items to customize your build.
People are weard

This is everything you would want from a MOBA game. It utilizes VR in a way no other game has.  The graphics are insane for being free. The only other thing I want from this game is the ability to switch heroes in the middle of rounds.

reviews.review_title: Utilizes VR like no other game
reviews.review_description: Ive played over 150 different Vr games over the past several years, and NO OTHER GAME utilizes the freedom of controls Vr gives you, quite like starvault. This game is a well executed MOBA, but where it really shines is the hero designs. Every hero has a completely unique feel and playstyle driven around their control design. A hoverboard character requires you to lean in the direction you want to move, a two armed mech character uses gorrilla tag style movement, a acrobatic bard assassin lets you jump 20 feet in the air and flip in the direction you want to move etc.. The development team is also super active, pushing out multiple minor patches a month and usually at least one new content patch every two months, meanwhile they’ve been hosting competitions and tournaments, the lastest one having a $5k  prize pool! Super excited to see where this game goes!

Star Wars is a great game. It is fun. It is nice to play. The only complaints that I have is that the assassin character is very overpowered and I believe it should be a little weaker but overall it is a great game and I recommend it. 
￼

this game is so fun to play, I love the variety and the style of the characters, they all have different playstyles and once you find yours it's SO FUN, it's difficult at first but mastering is the fun part! I'd recommend for everyone to give it a go!
This game is amazing it brought me something back fun again in vr, best part about it is it’s free. There is a wide variety of characters and tons of playstyles to choose from it is amazing and fun.

reviews.review_title: This game deserves to be bigger
reviews.review_description: One of the best games on meta rn
This game has genuinely one of the most thought out heros with so many different heros with proper variety. DO GIVE IT A TRY! It has too much content and polishness for a free game!
Very nice moba in VR
Amazing game i would recommend
Fun game
Beings back great memories of other MOBA game. Simply fanatic in VR
Tutorial still needs some work but honestly the game has a great moba feel that lets you make plays and feel skillful. Highly recommend.

reviews.review_title: The best and most disappointing VR game
reviews.review_description:
I don’t write reviews.
There’s nothing to say. 99.9% of games, VR especially are noise. They arent even failures in an interesting way. They’re just… there. 
So when something actually crosses the threshold into worth noticing.
Starvault is one of those rare cases.
Abilities are great, timing windows exist, and fight interactions feel authored rather than accidental. There’s a DISGUSTING talent of smoothness to engagements that most  VR developers (Heck even many PC game studios) seem incapable of producing. Optimization is shockingly good (Though PCVR>>>>headset). 
Abilities? They’re distinct without being gimmicks, impactful without being OP,  and they suggest a design philosophy that understands player expression (Caleo is EXCELLENT game design). You can see the skeleton of a triple A killer competitive game here one that could have defined A NEW ERA of gaming.
Which makes what the game actually is so much worse.
Because Starvault is a MOBA in the same way a cardboard box is a house. It pretends. But underneath, it’s not even close.
What you’re actually playing is a TF2 payload match. 
Theres no meaningful laning phase, no real 1v1 skirmish ecosystem, cards instead of item buys. No controlled escalation into teamfights. Instead, you get this bizarre, blob of activity where bots shuffle through the middle of the map like they wandered in from a different game entirely
And then there’s the gunplay. D-Slater here is disgusting. Not because gunplay is inherently bad but because it’s misplaced. It hijacks the games identity at the exact point where it should be committing to something far more interesting. Instead of leaning into short-to-mid range dueling, spacing, cooldown trading; the actual language of competitive MOBA. The game defaults to shooting mechanics that flatten encounters into something generic, a sea of clashingly designed heroes that belong in different games. Bad enough to knock a game from a 10 to a 6. SVault snatched defeat from the jaws of victory
